purpose.text: This process performs a daily settlement reconciliation by retrieving a bank's settlement transactions, summing their amounts, and comparing the resulting total against an expected total supplied at the start of the run. If the difference (variance) falls within an acceptable tolerance, the process ends normally reporting the totals; if the variance falls outside tolerance, the process raises a case for investigation and throws a business exception to flag the discrepancy for follow-up.

inputs.name: ExpectedTotal
inputs.description: The expected settlement total for the account/period being reconciled, provided by the calling context.

inputs.name: Tolerance
inputs.description: The acceptable margin of error between the actual running total and the expected total, defaulted to 25.
inputs.source: Process data item with initial value

inputs.name: Settlement Transactions
inputs.description: Transaction rows for the account/date range retrieved from the core banking system to be summed for reconciliation.
inputs.source: MFG Core Banking object, Get Transactions action

outputs.name: RunningTotal
outputs.description: The accumulated sum of all transaction amounts retrieved for the reconciliation period.

outputs.name: RowCount
outputs.description: The count of transaction rows processed during reconciliation.

outputs.name: CaseId
outputs.description: Identifier of the variance investigation case created when reconciliation fails.
outputs.destination: MFG Case Manager object, Create Case action

business_rules.statement: The variance between the running total of transactions and the expected total must fall within +/- the configured tolerance for reconciliation to pass.
When the variance is outside tolerance, a Settlement Variance case must be created before the process reports failure.
When the variance is outside tolerance, the process must raise a Business Exception rather than complete normally.

exception_semantics.condition: The computed variance between running total and expected total is outside the defined tolerance range.
exception_semantics.current_handling: The process creates a 'Settlement Variance' case via the MFG Case Manager object and then throws a Business Exception with details of the variance.

human_touchpoints.description: A case is created in the Case Manager system for settlement variances outside tolerance, implying a human reviewer will investigate and resolve the discrepancy.
